pages.title: Pavojingos medžiagos
pages.text: Kai kurios $(thing)rudos$(), $(thing)dulkes$() ir $(thing)chemines medžiagos$() yra pavojingos ir jei jas nešiojate savo inventoriuje, gali sukelti $(item)neigiamus poveikius$() ar netgi $(item)nužudyti$() Jus. Kai juos nešiojate, ekrane rodoma $(item)poveikio būsena$().$(br2)Tam tikra įranga, pavyzdžiui, $(thing)kaukės$(), $(thing)pirštinės$() ir $(thing)apsauginis kostiumas nuo pavojingų medžiagų$() gali būti naudojami šiems poveikiams neutralizuoti.

pages.title: Visi poveikiai
pages.text: $(li)$(l:tfg_ores/hazards#Arsenicosis)Arsenicosis$()$()$(li)$(l:tfg_ores/hazards#Asbestosis)Asbestosis$()$()$(li)$(l:tfg_ores/hazards#Berylliosis)Berylliosis$()$(li)$(l:tfg_ores/hazards#Carbon_Monoxide_poisoning)Carbon Monoxide poisoning$()$(li)$(l:tfg_ores/hazards#Carcinogens)Carcinogens$()$(li)$(l:tfg_ores/hazards#Chemical_burns)Chemical burns$()$(li)$(l:tfg_ores/hazards#Irritants)Irritants$()$(li)$(l:tfg_ores/hazards#Methanol_poisoning)Methanol poisoning$()$(li)$(l:tfg_ores/hazards#Nauseating_chemicals)Nauseating chemicals$()$(li)$(l:tfg_ores/hazards#Poisons)Poisonous materials$()$(li)$(l:tfg_ores/hazards#Radioactive_materials)Radioactive materials$()$(li)$(l:tfg_ores/hazards#Silicosis)Silicosis$()$()$(br2)The next page will provide information on how to deal with these effects.

pages.title: Prevencija ir gydymai
pages.text: $(li)$(l:tfg_ores/hazards#rocks)Rocks?$()$()$(li)$(l:tfg_ores/hazards#containers)Containers$()$(li)$(l:tfg_ores/hazards#mask)The Face Mask$()$(li)$(l:tfg_ores/hazards#gloves)The Rubber Gloves$()$(li)$(l:tfg_ores/hazards#hazmat)The Hazmat Suit$()$(li)$(l:tfg_ores/hazards#medicine)Pills, Tablets and Salvos$()$(li)$(l:tfg_ores/hazards#rad_away)The RadAwayᵗᵐ pill$()$(li)$(l:tfg_ores/hazards#respawn)The Unthinkable...$()

pages.title: Akmenys!
pages.text: $(thing)Lengviausias būdas$() $(thing)išvengti$() pavojingų poveikių yra $(item)iš viso neimti pavojingų daiktų$().$(br2)Pavyzdžiui, užpildydami savo inventorių $(thing)akmenimis$(), Jūs galėsite pasirinkti, kuriuos daiktus norite paimti, o su pavojingaisiais susitvarkyti vėliau.

pages.title: Konteineriai
pages.text: Pavojingos medžiagos daro žalą tik tada, kai jos yra Jūsų $(thing)inventoriuje$(), tačiau tai netaikoma kitiems konteineriams!$(br)Pavojingos medžiagos nepadarys žalos, kol jos bus kitame konteinerį, pavyzdžiui, $(l:tfg_tips/inventory_management)kuprinėje$() arba $(l:getting_started/pottery#vessel)indelyje$(). $(thing)Dešiniuoju pelės mygtuku spustelėjus$() laikant indelį, jo turinį bus galima tiesiogiai perkelti į kitus indus ir iš konteinerių.

pages.title: Veido kaukė
pages.text: $(thing)Veido kaukė$() suteikia apsaugą nuo bet kokių $(item)Įkvėpimo$() pavojų, pavyzdžiui: arsenikozės.

pages.title: guminės pirštinės
pages.text: The $(thing)Rubber gloves$() can either be made from $(l:mechanics/leather_making)Leather$() and $(l:arborfirmacraft/making_rubber)Latex$(), or out of $(thing)Rubber Sheets$(). They provide protection from any $(item)Skin Contact$() hazards, such as $(thing)Beryllium Dust$().
First, knap the leather into mittens.
$(thing)Mittens$() are then soaked in $(thing)Vinegar$(), a mixture of fruit and alcohol.
Prepared $(thing)leather gloves$() are then heated in a $(thing)vat$() with $(thing)Vulcanized Latex$(), one step away from rubber.
Finally, the latex-soaked gloves are heated in an $(l:firmalife/ovens)Oven$().

pages.title: Apsauginis kostiumas
pages.text: Užbaigtas$(thing)apsauginis kostiumas $()užtikrina $(item)apsaugą $()nuo $(item)visų$() pavojų, net ir $(item)radiacijos$(). Jis pagamintas $(thing)ŽĮ („LV“) surinkėjo$() iš $(thing)polietileno$() ir $(thing)polivinilchlorido$().$(br2)Įdomus faktas! Jūs taip pat galite paieškoti $(thing)#ppe_armor$() „JEI“ duomenų bazėje, kad rastumėte daugiau įrangos, kurie suteikia apsauga nuo pavojingų medžiagų.

pages.title: Medicina
pages.text: In case you do get heavily exposed to a hazard, there are some $(thing)Medicines$() that can help you recover.$(br2)Basic $(thing)Pills$() are the most primitive and easy to make, but most come with $(item)Negative Side Effects$(). $(thing)Tablets$() and $(thing)Salvos$() are more effective and have less side effects, but they require $(thing)LV equipment$() and more advanced resources to make.

pages.title: „RadAwayᵗᵐ“ tabletė
pages.text: Tai yra $(item)galutinis$() vaistas, skirtas $(item)VISIEMS$() pavojams ir $(item)TIK$() veiksmingas vaistas nuo $(item)Spinduliuotės$(). Tačiau tai taip pat yra $(thing)brangiausias$() ir $(thing)sunkiausiai$() pagaminamas daiktas, kuriam reikia $(thing)AĮ(„HV“) įtampos pakopos įrangos ir pažangių medžiagų.

pages.title: Failure...
pages.text: If all else fails, bringing along a bed to respawn is a good idea.$(br2)If you don't have access to $(thing)Wool$() or $(thing)String$(), you can also make a $(l:getting_started/a_place_to_sleep)Thatch Bed$().

pages.title: Arsenikozė
pages.text: $(thing)Arsenicosis$() is an illness caused by inhaling $(thing)Arsenic$() from its dust, vapor or $(thing)Realgar$(). It slowly increases $(item)hunger$(), followed by $(item)nausea$(), and eventually $(item)death$().$(br2)The $(l:tfg_ores/hazards#mask)Face Mask$() and the $(l:tfg_ores/hazards#hazmat)Hazmat Suit$() provide protection from $(thing)Arsenicosis$().

pages.title: Asbestozė
pages.text: $(thing)Asbestosis$() is an illness caused by inhaling $(thing)Asbestos$() dust. If carried for long enough, it causes $(item)hunger$().$(br2)The $(l:tfg_ores/hazards#mask)Face Mask$() and the $(l:tfg_ores/hazards#hazmat)Hazmat Suit$() provide protection from $(thing)Asbestosis$().

pages.title: Beryliozė
pages.text: $(thing)Berylliosis$() is an illness caused by skin contact with $(thing)Beryllium dust$() or $(thing)Liquid Beryllium$(). At first it might seem that it doesn't do much. However, the longer the exposure, the faster it $(item)kills$() you.$(br2)$(l:tfg_ores/hazards#gloves)Gloves$() and the $(l:tfg_ores/hazards#hazmat)Hazmat Suit$() provide protection from $(thing)Berylliosis$().

pages.title: Anglies monoksido apsinuodijimas
pages.text: $(thing)Carbon Monoxide poisoning$() is an illness caused by inhaling $(thing)Carbon Monoxide$() gas. Prolonged exposure causes $(item)nausea$() and quick $(item)death$().$(br2)The $(l:tfg_ores/hazards#mask)Face Mask$() and the $(l:tfg_ores/hazards#hazmat)Hazmat Suit$() provide protection from $(thing)Carbon Monoxide$().

pages.title: Kancerogenai
pages.text: $(thing)Carcinogens$() are substances that cause $(item)Cancer$(). They include $(thing)Chromium Dust$() aswell as some organic compounds, such as $(thing)Benzene and its products$(). $(thing)Carcinogens$() $(item)don't go away on their own$(), but they give plenty of warnings before doing any real harm. It starts off with $(item)Weakness$(), followed by $(item)Hunger$(), then $(item)Slowness$() and later on $(item)Mining Fatique$(). Only when substantial enough exposure is accumulated it causes $(item)Death$().

pages.title: Kancerogenai
pages.text: The $(l:tfg_ores/hazards#mask)Face Mask$() protects from inhalation of harmful chemicals, while the $(l:tfg_ores/hazards#gloves)Gloves$() protect from contact with $(thing)Chromium Dust$().$(br2)The $(l:tfg_ores/hazards#hazmat)Hazmat Suit$() protects from both.$(br2)In case of severe exposure, it is advised to take some $(l:tfg_ores/hazards#medicine)Medicines$() to $(thing)Prevent$() any possible damage.

pages.title: Cheminiai nudegimai
pages.text: $(thing)Cheminiai nudegimai$() atsiranda įkvėpus arba patekus ant odos tam tikrų $(thing)dujų$(), $(thing)rūgštų$(), $(thing)pagrindais$() arba $(thing)dulkių$(). Poveikis sukelia $(item)silpnumą$().$(br2) Veido kaukė $(l:tfg_ores/hazards#mask)apsaugo nuo įkvėpimo, o $(l:tfg_ores/hazards#gloves)pirštinės$()apsaugo nuo tiesioginio kontakto su oda.$(br2) Apsauginis kostiumas $() apsaugo nuo visko.

pages.title: Irritants
pages.text: $(thing)Irritation$() is caused by inhalation of $(thing)Ammonium Formate$() or skin contact with $(thing)Chromite Dust$(). Short contact only causes $(item)Weakness$(), but if ignored for longer it starts $(item)Damaging Randomly$().$(br2)The $(l:tfg_ores/hazards#mask)Face Mask$() protects from inhalation, while the $(l:tfg_ores/hazards#gloves)Gloves$() protects from direct skin contact.$(br2)The $(l:tfg_ores/hazards#hazmat)Hazmat Suit$() protects from both.

pages.title: Metanolio apsinuodijimas
pages.text: $(thing)Methanol poisoning$() is caused by inhalation of $(thing)Methanol$(). It causes a strong $(item)Blindness$() effect.$(br2)The $(l:tfg_ores/hazards#mask)Face Mask$() and the $(l:tfg_ores/hazards#hazmat)Hazmat Suit$() protects from inhalation.

pages.title: Pykinimo medžiagos
pages.text: $(thing)Nauseating chemicals$(), such as $(thing)Butyraldehyde$(), are substances that cause $(item)Nausea$() when inhaled.$(br2)The $(l:tfg_ores/hazards#mask)Face Mask$() and the $(l:tfg_ores/hazards#hazmat)Hazmat Suit$() protect from inhalation.

pages.title: Nuodingos medžiagos
pages.text: There are two types of $(thing)Poisonous materials$(). Weak include $(thing)Lead Dust$(), while the stronger poisons include $(thing)Nitrogen Dioxide$(). $(thing)Weak poisons$() cause a $(item)Progressively Worsening Poison$() effect, while $(thing)Regular poisons$() cause $(item)Weakness$() and a $(item)Stronger Poison$() effect.$(br2)The $(l:tfg_ores/hazards#mask)Face Mask$() protects from inhalation, while the $(l:tfg_ores/hazards#gloves)Gloves$() protects from direct skin contact.$(br2)The $(l:tfg_ores/hazards#hazmat)Hazmat Suit$() protects from any contact.

pages.title: Radioaktyviosios medžiagos
pages.text: Dauguma $(thing)radioaktyviųjų medžiagų $()kaip $(thing)uranas 238$(), su kuriomis Jūs susidursite tik pasiekus $(thing)EĮ („EV“) lygį$() arba aukštesnį. Jos $(item)nuolat Jus apšvitins$(). Nedidelis poveikis sukelia $(item)švytėjimą$(), bet ilgalaikis kontaktas sukelia greitą $(item)mirtį$().$(br2)Žinome, kad jis atrodo skanus ir turi milijardą kalorijų, bet $(#ff0000)PRAŠOME NEVALGYTI URANO!$()

pages.title: Radioaktyviosios medžiagos
pages.text: Only the $(l:tfg_ores/hazards#hazmat)Hazmat Suit$(), as well as some advanced armors provide full protection from radiation.$(br2)In the case you do get irradiated, only the $(l:tfg_ores/hazards#rad_away)RadAwayᵗᵐ pill$() can cure you.

pages.title: Silikozė
pages.text: $(thing)Silicosis$() is an illness caused by inhaling $(thing)Silicon Dioxide Dust$(). Exposure causes a $(item)Reduction$() in both $(item)Health$() and the $(item)Air Supply$() you have while diving $(thing)Under Water$().$(br2)The $(l:tfg_ores/hazards#mask)Face Mask$() and the $(l:tfg_ores/hazards#hazmat)Hazmat Suit$() provide protection from inhalation of silicon dioxide.
